title: Build Your Credit Score
description: Go from no credit to a real score with a secured card and on-time habits. Credit is the key that unlocks apartments, cars, and lower deposits.

steps.title: Check if you already have credit (and fix fraud)
steps.what: A lot of foster kids have credit reports opened in their name without knowing — sometimes with fraud on them.
steps.why: You can't build on a broken foundation. Catching identity theft now saves you years.
steps.action: Pull your free reports at annualcreditreport.com. If something's wrong, we'll walk you through disputing it.
steps.ai_check: Did you pull your credit report? See anything that wasn't you?

steps.title: Get a secured credit card
steps.what: A secured card uses a small deposit (often $200) as your limit. It's the easiest way to start with no credit.
steps.why: No-fee secured cards report to all 3 bureaus, so every on-time month builds your score.
steps.action: Look at Discover it Secured, Capital One Platinum Secured, or your bank's option. Apply for one.
steps.ai_check: Did you get approved for a secured card?

steps.title: Use 1 small recurring bill on it
steps.what: Put one thing you already pay — like your phone or a streaming app — on the card. Nothing else.
steps.why: Low usage + always paying it off is exactly what builds a high score fast.
steps.action: Set one subscription to autopay from the card.
steps.ai_check: Got one small bill running through the card?

steps.title: Autopay the full balance every month
steps.what: Carrying a balance doesn't build credit faster — it just costs you interest. Pay it in full, on time, always.
steps.why: Payment history is 35% of your score. One autopay protects it forever.
steps.action: Turn on autopay for the statement balance in the card app.
steps.ai_check: Is autopay set to the full balance?

steps.title: Keep usage under 30% and wait
steps.what: Try not to use more than about a third of your limit. Then just let time do the work.
steps.why: Credit age and low usage push your score up month after month. Patience pays here.
steps.action: Check your score monthly (free in most bank apps). Watch it climb.
steps.ai_check: Is your usage under 30% and your score moving up?
